'''Ord Vaxal''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==History==
[[File:Ord_Vaxal_street.jpg|thumb|left|250px|A [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] is apprehended on Ord Vaxal.]]

Ord Vaxal had a 11,254-km diameter. It had three continents and numerous archipelagos. Its local day lasted 25 standard hours; its local year lasted 288 standard days. Indigenous creatures include [[risp]]s and [[trigha]]s.

It was an [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]]. A number of animals were imported to the planet: [[jungle bantha]]s, [[Eopie/Legends|eopies]], [[Ronto/Legends|rontos]], and [[Nerf/Legends|nerfs]]. The prisoners took control of the Ord Vaxal in the [[Jailbreak]] of [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]].

Under Imperial rule, [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Adria Reyn]] allowed [[Sassallo]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] of the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Kajidic/Legends|''kajidic'']] to practically rule the world. Sassallo and Adria once almost captured [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]].

{{Planet-stub}}
